privileged_info_summary: The supply_chain_sla_audit task operates on logistics_audit_q3.xlsx, a synthetic dataset containing 200 shipment records with columns: Order ID, Shipping Mode, Sales Amount, Scheduled Days, Actual Days, and Rebate Amount. The Shipments sheet uses SLA rules defining rebate percentages by shipping mode (Same Day: 100%, First Class: 50%, Second Class: 10%, Standard Class: 0%). Rebate amounts are calculated as Sales Amount × Rebate % when shipments are late (Actual Days > Scheduled Days), otherwise 0. The task requires creating an Audit_Summary sheet with total rebates by mode and applying red conditional formatting to rebate amounts exceeding $50. The verifier checks calculation accuracy with 0.05 tolerance, summary table correctness, and conditional formatting application.
